title: Find My Device - Sending Tone - X button
scenario: Find My Device tone does not stop when X button is tapped, user is not returned to map screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a headset paired and connected.
2. Navigate to App Settings > Find My Device (allow GPS if prompted).
3. Tap the blue geo icon to locate the device on the map.
4. Tap the Play button to start playing a tone on the headset.
5. Tap "OK, Got It" on the confirmation prompt.
6. Tap the Play button again to replay the tone.
7. Tap the "X" button to stop the tone.
expected: The tone stops playing and the user is returned to the Find My Device map screen.
